About Us

We are an Australian Ag-tech company developing advanced fresh produce grading and quality assessment technology used by growers and packhouses to improve yield, consistency, and profitability. Our systems combine hardware, computer vision, and machine learning with hard real-time constraints, in real‑world agricultural environments.

We’re growing our engineering team and are looking for a Machine Learning Software Developer who wants to work on applied ML problems in real world applications.




The Role

You will design, build, and deploy machine learning models that sit at the heart of our fruit grading technology. This role is hands‑on and end‑to‑end: from data exploration and model development through to production deployment on real systems.

You’ll work closely with software engineers, hardware engineers, and product teams to deliver robust ML solutions that perform reliably in challenging, real‑world conditions.




What You’ll Bring


PhD in Computer Vision, Robotics, or related field

2 years’ industry experience (ideal: PhD + some commercial exposure)

Strong grounding in mathematics, algorithms, and 3D problem solving

Experience working with sensor data (LIDAR, cameras, etc.)

Strong Python skills (language less important than thinking ability)




Key Responsibilities

Develop and deploy machine learning and computer vision models for fresh produce grading and quality assessment

Work with image, sensor, and classification data to improve accuracy, speed, and robustness

Build and maintain ML pipelines (training, validation, inference, monitoring)

Optimise models for production environments (latency, memory, hardware constraints)

Collaborate with cross‑functional teams to integrate ML into production software

Continuously evaluate and improve model performance using real‑world data

Contribute to technical direction and best practices in ML development
